Petition To Compel The Public Administrator Of The City And County Of San Francisco To Comply With The Court Order Of Oct 31, 1994 And For Any Inerest Earned On Funds
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Continued To Feb-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion and Janet Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.
Brian Connors for Harry Snow (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether or not funds for small estates that were in the possession of the Public Administrator were properly transferred to the Treasurer. The Petition to Compel the Public Administrator to Comply with Court Order of October 31, 1994, etc. is continued to February 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to meet and confer, identify any disputed facts, identify any agreed facts and discuss how they are going to get this resolved. A joint status report is to be filed by February 18, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Trausch. Not reported.
